title: TS10 5QW, Redcar Holdings Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/TP3502MS/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Redcar Holdings Limited   Installation name: Redcar Energy Centre   Permit number: EPR/TP3502MS/A001   "
